residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 266-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: VIM-2 reference-record metal-site evidence, conserved class B metallo-beta-lactamase motif mapping, and a ProteinGym AF2 structure-derived metal-site shell. See data/proteingym/source_records/uniprot_vim2_metal_site_reference.json.
evidence: The active_site_neighborhood group is a +/-2 residue window around the curated VIM-2 metal-binding/catalytic-site residues. The curated_metal_binding_site group is the exact six-residue site from the label file. The structure_metal_site_shell_5a group was derived from data/proteingym/structures/A4GRB6_PSEAI.pdb using scripts/derive_residue_shell.py and includes residues with any heavy atom within 5.0 Angstrom of any curated metal-binding residue heavy atom. The shell source record is data/proteingym/source_records/A4GRB6_PSEAI_metal_site_shell_5A.json.
